task: Browse used Mercedes-Benz cars from model years 2004 to 2012 on KBB and sort by highest price.
graderReasoning: The agent reached KBB's Cars for Sale page and applied the requested filters: Mercedes-Benz make, year range 2004 to 2012, and Used condition. Final snapshot explicitly shows active filter chips 'Used', 'Mercedes-Benz', and '2004 - 2012', with the year comboboxes set to Min Year: 2004 and Max Year: 2012. The sort dropdown is visible with 'Price - Highest' selected. This satisfies the task to browse used Mercedes-Benz cars from model years 2004 to 2012 on KBB and sort by highest price.
final_result_response:
Confirmed. The filters are still active:

- Min Year: 2004
- Max Year: 2012
- Make: Mercedes-Benz
- Condition: Used
- Sort By: Price - Highest

KBB is showing 51 matches for used Mercedes-Benz cars in that year range near 94102.
action_history: Opening KBB: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.kbb.com/');
Opening cars for sale: await page.locator('e3').click();
Opening minimum year menu: await page.locator('e28').click();
Selecting 2004 as minimum year: await page.locator('e522').click();
Selecting 2012 as maximum year: await page.locator('e547').click();

screenshots.title: Selecting used condition and highest-price sort
